title: Contact | Caroline Dinenage MP
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Caroline Dinenage, the Conservative MP for Gosport, Stubbington, Lee-on-the-Solent & Hill Head.
headings: h3: Caroline Dinenage MP Conservative MP for Gosport
text_excerpt: Contact | Caroline Dinenage MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home News In Parliament Local Campaigns Newsletters Contact Contact Leave this field blank Gosport Office 167 Stoke Road, Gosport, PO12 1SE 02392 522 121 [email protected] Westminster Office House of Commons, Westminster, SW1A 0AA 02072197078 [email protected] Caroline on Facebook Caroline on X Caroline on Instagram Caroline on LinkedIn Caroline on YouTube Caroline is here to work for you. Please do not hesitate to contact her with any concerns, issues or thoughts you have, using the form below. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
